summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: The day's wide open in front of you, and you're walking into it carrying more than the short night should've left you — your system bounced back above its usual line and it's holding steady. You've got a light start already banked, about a thousand steps and two meals down, so the engine's warm without anything really spent. After yesterday's big push, the smart move is to feed the work — keep your plates protein-heavy so the output you're stacking doesn't go hungry.

Performance: Push hard. You're sitting above your normal recovery line even off a thin night, so take the green light and go after real output today — just match the effort with food, especially protein.

Transit: none
